deepRecoveryTasks.reason: The only VISITING_STUDENT_PAGE captured (src_40) is for AdventHealth Redmond (GA), not AdventHealth Orlando (FL). No Orlando-specific visiting student / observership / clerkship page was located, and no explicit negative quote was captured for the Orlando campus.

verdictSummary: Zero PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE claims; ledger is internally consistent. Visiting-student, GME, careers, benefits, and DHI pages either reference wrong campuses (Redmond/Gordon/Kissimmee/DHI West FL) or are future-lane content, and the classifier has already routed them to FUTURE_LANE_ONLY or HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED. Tier 1 coverage is PASS_PARTIAL: a visiting-student family was searched but only off-campus (Redmond) content surfaced; recovery tasks proposed for Orlando-scoped USCE evidence.
